products.title: Ocean Nights Maxi Dress
products.body_html:
VALUES

Handcrafted
Organic
Fair
Minimal Waste


CURATOR'S NOTE

Relaxed fit, sleeveless, v-neck, maxi dress that is fitted at the waist with drawstrings that have cowrie shells on the tie ends, crafted in azo-free dyed, handspun and handwoven Kala cotton fabric.

Timeless looks like this dress are a must for conscious closets. Dress it up with jewelry and heels for when you go out, or keep it super simple for casual occasions.

THE DESIGNER STORY

"Sui" is the new endeavor of the brand Sue Mue. A budding label, that aims to weave together our love for travel and connection with design. The brand believes in an optimistic and responsible fashion, that our world deserves to be loved more and that our connections with people are key to building a label with a legacy. The Brand's collections find inspiration from our travel adventures; every piece of clothing is lovingly made in Delhi, India with sustainable fabrics.

THE FINE PRINT

Fabric: Handwoven Kala Cotton

Delivery: 17-21 Days

Care Instructions: 1. Hand wash separately at room temperature or machine wash in gentle cycle and use mild detergents only. Line Dry.
2. Do not bleach or scrub
3. Dark colors may bleed. Wash alone for its first wash then with similar colors
4. Dry away from direct sunlight
5. Do not tumble dry
6. Avoid all contact with citric content substances
7. Iron warm in reverse
8. Dry clean only if necessary

Fit: Relaxed

The model is 5'7" and is wearing a size XS.

For custom orders, please email us at orders@ikkivi.com

products.title: Sea Soul Linen Top
products.body_html:
VALUES

Handcrafted
Organic
Fair
Minimal Waste


CURATOR'S NOTE

Regular fit, round-neck, sleeveless, peplum top crafted in azo-free dyed linen fabric, machine embroidered with ocean-inspired motifs.

A classic, staple top is one that can accompany you on office days or while you drop by a cafe - perfect for your everyday journeys. This piece is crafted from fabric made from flax plant fibres.

Techniques Used: Machine Embroidery.

THE DESIGNER STORY

"Sui" is the new endeavor of the brand Sue Mue. A budding label, that aims to weave together our love for travel and connection with design. The brand believes in an optimistic and responsible fashion, that our world deserves to be loved more and that our connections with people are key to building a label with a legacy. The Brand's collections find inspiration from our travel adventures; every piece of clothing is lovingly made in Delhi, India with sustainable fabrics.

THE FINE PRINT

Delivery: 17-21 Days

Care Instructions: 1. Hand wash separately at room temperature or machine wash in gentle cycle and use mild detergents only. Line Dry.
2. Do not bleach or scrub
3. Dark colors may bleed. Wash alone for its first wash then with similar colors
4. Dry away from direct sunlight
5. Do not tumble dry
6. Avoid all contact with citric content substances
7. Iron warm in reverse
8. Dry clean only if necessary

Fit: Regular Length: 20.5"

The model is 5'7" and is wearing a size XS.

For custom orders, please email us at orders@ikkivi.com

products.title: Dreamy Summer Dress
products.body_html:
VALUES

Handcrafted
Organic
Fair
Minimal Waste


CURATOR'S NOTE

Fitted, strapless, midi dress that's fitted around the bodice with an a-line skirt, crafted in azo-free dyed Tencel, hand embroidered with starfish inspired motifs.

This elegant dress is the perfect holiday look - something you can celebrate all your precious moments in, staying light as a feather through it all, but it's also a great everyday staple that can journey with you to your favourite cafes!

THE DESIGNER STORY

"Sui" is the new endeavor of the brand Sue Mue. A budding label, that aims to weave together our love for travel and connection with design. The brand believes in an optimistic and responsible fashion, that our world deserves to be loved more and that our connections with people are key to building a label with a legacy. The Brand's collections find inspiration from our travel adventures; every piece of clothing is lovingly made in Delhi, India with sustainable fabrics.

THE FINE PRINT

Fabric: Lenzing Tencel

Delivery: 17-21 Days

Care Instructions: 1. Hand wash separately at room temperature or machine wash in gentle cycle and use mild detergents only. Line Dry.
2. Do not bleach or scrub
3. Dark colors may bleed. Wash alone for its first wash then with similar colors
4. Dry away from direct sunlight
5. Do not tumble dry
6. Avoid all contact with citric content substances
7. Iron warm in reverse
8. Dry clean only if necessary

Fit: Fitted

The model is 5'7" and is wearing a size XS.

For custom orders, please email us at orders@ikkivi.com

products.title: Starfish Dress
products.body_html:
VALUES

Handcrafted
Organic
Fair
Minimal Waste


CURATOR'S NOTE

Fitted, sleeveless, v-neck, mini dress with drawstings at the shoulders crafted in handspun and handwoven organic cotton fabric, hand block printed with our signature ocean life inspired motif using azo-free dyes.

A staple summer dress is a must for any sustainable wardrobe. This elegant, chic silhouette is for those days you want to be a bit more dressed up but still feel light on your feet.

THE DESIGNER STORY

"Sui" is the new endeavor of the brand Sue Mue. A budding label, that aims to weave together our love for travel and connection with design. The brand believes in an optimistic and responsible fashion, that our world deserves to be loved more and that our connections with people are key to building a label with a legacy. The Brand's collections find inspiration from our travel adventures; every piece of clothing is lovingly made in Delhi, India with sustainable fabrics.

THE FINE PRINT

Fabric: Handspun Handwoven Organic Cotton
Delivery: 17- 21 Days
Care Instructions:
1. Hand wash separately at room temperature or machine wash in gentle cycle and use mild detergents only. Line Dry.
2. Do not bleach or scrub
3. Dark colors may bleed. Wash alone for its first wash then with similar colors
4. Dry away from direct sunlight
5. Do not tumble dry
6. Avoid all contact with citric content substances
7. Iron warm in reverse
8. Dry clean only if necessary

Measurements: Dress Length: 33" Fit: Fitted.

Model is 5'7" and is wearing a size 2XS.

For custom orders, please email us at orders@ikkivi.com

products.body_html:
VALUES

Handcrafted
Organic
Fair
Minimal Waste


CURATOR'S NOTE

Regular fit, wide-leg shorts that buttons at the waist, crafted in indigo dyed cotton denim fabric created with a blend of cotton and recycled cotton fibres, crocheted and hand embroidered with a crab and starfish motif.

A classic pair of shorts are a perfect everyday go-to piece, especially on hot summer days.

Techniques Used: Hand Embroidery. Crochet.
